variants.title: HiFi Filter SAO 16888 Engine Breather Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAO 16888 Engine Breather Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SAO 16888 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Fleetguard CV50628 Crankcase Ventilation | Replaces the HiFi Filter SAO 16888
variants.description: Fleetguard® CV50628 premium coalescer static kit features patented technologies that control oil drip and emissions with the highest oil and particle removal efficiency available.
